what_i_built: A typing speed test with real-time WPM tracking, accuracy stats, and a library of text passages. Characters light up green/red as you type — instant visual feedback.
what_was_tricky: Getting the cursor tracking right. When a user makes a mistake mid-word, you need to decide: do you let them keep typing and mark everything after as wrong, or block progress? I went with the forgiving approach — mark mistakes but let them keep going. Feels more natural.
fun_facts: Built the same day as the calculator — two projects in day one
The word list includes quotes from various sources to keep it interesting
Real-time WPM calculation updates every keystroke, not just at the end
